text: Here's what science actually says about antioxidant nuance. Antioxidants fight free radicals, but not all are created equal. Some can heal, while others may disrupt processes in the body. Preliminary research shows the effects vary by source and dosage. Balanced diets with fruits and vegetables offer the best benefits. Curious about more science truths? Like, share, and follow for more!
